_comment: Transformer trust inference model configuration — ENHANCED v3
_changes_from_v2: input_dim: 5 → 30 (temporal feature enrichment: 5 base features × 6 enrichments each = 30)
Enrichments: value, delta, rolling_mean, rolling_std, z_score, slope
d_model: 128 → 128 (unchanged, model handles larger input dimensions via attention)
Added use_focal_loss flag with alpha/gamma parameters
Ensured total parameters stay under 1.5x original

architecture._input_dim_note: Enhanced with temporal features: 5 base features × 6 enrichments each (value, delta, rolling_mean, rolling_std, z_score, slope) = 30 total features per timestep
architecture._dropout_note: Can be tuned in range [0.1, 0.3] for regularization
architecture._note: output_activation=none: model outputs raw logit. BCEWithLogitsLoss applies sigmoid internally.

quantization.note: Post-training static quantization reduces model to ~12-15 MB (slightly larger due to more input features)

training._loss_note: pos_weight = n_legit/n_adv computed automatically from training set
training._focal_loss_note: Set to true to use Focal Loss instead of BCE for better handling of class imbalance
training._focal_alpha_note: Weighting factor for minority class in Focal Loss (range 0.25-0.75)
training._focal_gamma_note: Focusing parameter for hard examples (typical range 1.0-3.0)

trust_scoring._tau_min_note: Minimum trust score for legitimate agents; P(adversarial) threshold = 1 - tau_min
trust_scoring._temperature_note: Initial temperature for logit scaling; can be optimized via calibration
trust_scoring._adv_threshold_note: P(adversarial) threshold = 1 - tau_min = 0.35. Agent flagged when sigmoid(logit) > 0.35
trust_scoring._threshold_sweep_note: Sweep thresholds 0.1-0.9 at step 0.05 during validation to find optimal F1
trust_scoring._calibration_note: Optional temperature scaling calibration on validation set to improve ECE

hardware_targets._memory_note: Increased from 6-8 MB due to larger input dimension (5→30 features) and model parameters. Still well within embedded constraints.
